title: selaginella finitima
intro: Selaginella finitima, also known as the 'Mountain Air Plant' or 'Fairy's Breath', is a species of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella finitima are numerous, and it is used to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
